scoreDefinition: Before the fishability cap, a score of 80 ranks within the current comparison set above 80% of the 1,656 site/windows. Surf, wind, current, steep shorebreak, or expected crowding can cap the displayed score. It is not an 80% catch probability.
notice: Conditions are informational only. Check official access and CDFW rules. Bathymetry is not for navigation.

sources.name: National Weather Service hourly forecasts
sources.status: fresh; wind, daylight, and sky cover are scored when available

sources.name: NOAA NDBC buoy observations
sources.status: fresh; fresh swell height, period, estimated wave power, and three-hour atmospheric-pressure trend are scored near term

sources.name: Open-Meteo marine temperature, wave + current forecast (Météo-France)
sources.status: fresh; sea-surface temperature, wave height, period, power, and modeled current speed are bounded score inputs
sources.attribution: Weather data by Open-Meteo.com; marine model data by Météo-France.
sources.usageNote: The free endpoint is non-commercial only; use Open-Meteo's paid customer endpoint before enabling subscriptions, advertising, or other commercial use.

sources.name: Calculated moon phase
sources.status: calculated locally; low-weight signal to avoid double-counting the lunar effect already present in tides

sources.name: Provisional monthly California halibut seasonality fixture
sources.status: prototype prior only; not yet reproduced from a RecFIN export

sources.name: NOAA NCEI bathymetry / curated habitat proxy
sources.status: demo proxy; trained raster model not yet integrated

sources.name: CastingCompass expected access-pressure schedule
sources.status: small score modifier; curated space-and-popularity tiers by time of day, not Google Popular Times or live headcount

sources.name: NOAA CoastWatch chlorophyll and water-color inputs
sources.status: available for research; excluded until coastal resolution, cloud gaps, and local trip-log lift are validated
